tasks.label: finish cherry-pick on main
tasks.command: cd /home/garuzo/Desktop/The-Odin-Project/JAVASCRIPT/Advanced\ JS/Library && git add script.js script-enhancements.js && GIT_EDITOR=true git cherry-pick --continue && git push

tasks.label: finish cherry-pick on main
tasks.command: cd /home/garuzo/Desktop/The-Odin-Project/JAVASCRIPT/Advanced\ JS/Library && git add script.js script-enhancements.js index.html && if [ -f .git/CHERRY_PICK_HEAD ]; then GIT_EDITOR=true git cherry-pick --continue; else git commit -m "Split core assignment logic from advanced enhancements"; fi && git push origin main

tasks.label: checkout-refactor-branch
tasks.command: git checkout refactor/convert-to-classes && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD
